firm_isolation_select.name: firm_isolation_select
firm_isolation_select.using:
exists (
        select 1 from watchlists w
        where w.id = "watchlist_deals"."watchlist_id"
        and w.firm_id = (select ((auth.jwt() -> 'app_metadata')::jsonb ->> 'firm_id')::uuid)
        and w.deleted_at is null
      )

firm_isolation_insert.name: firm_isolation_insert
firm_isolation_insert.withCheck:
exists (
        select 1 from watchlists w
        where w.id = watchlist_id
        and w.firm_id = (select ((auth.jwt() -> 'app_metadata')::jsonb ->> 'firm_id')::uuid)
        and w.deleted_at is null
      )

firm_isolation_delete.name: firm_isolation_delete
firm_isolation_delete.using:
exists (
        select 1 from watchlists w
        where w.id = "watchlist_deals"."watchlist_id"
        and w.firm_id = (select ((auth.jwt() -> 'app_metadata')::jsonb ->> 'firm_id')::uuid)
        and w.deleted_at is null
      )
